summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI testing of Flowtym PMS SaaS with Kleon Figma Design System refonte. All modules tested: Login, PMS Planning, Channel Manager, CRM, E-Reputation, Housekeeping, RMS Hoptym, Configuration. Command Palette (CTRL+K) working. Design system correctly applied: violet #6C5CE7, fond #F8F9FC, bordures arrondies 12/16px, ombres douces, typographie Inter.

minor.issue: Error message 'Erreur lors du chargement du profil' displayed but form still works

passed_tests: Login page: Kleon design applied - violet gradient background, white card, rounded corners, Inter typography
Main Navigation: All module links functional (PMS, Channel, CRM, E-Reputation, Housekeeping, Hoptym, Rapports, Data Hub, Configuration)
Command Palette (CTRL+K): Opens correctly, search filtering works, keyboard navigation (↑↓ Enter ESC) functional
PMS Planning: KPI cards with colored top bars (violet, green, blue, yellow, red), 30-day planning grid, channel legend
Channel Manager: Inventaire Grid with TO Global, room types, prices by channel (Booking.com, Expedia), color-coded cells
CRM: KPI cards (Clients totaux, Taux de rétention, Score NPS, CA moyen), client list with filters, tabs functional
E-Reputation: Dashboard with Note Globale 4.3/5, charts (évolution notes, répartition), alertes, avis non répondus, OTA Booster Score
Housekeeping Réception: KPIs, room table with status badges, filters (Étage, Statut, Badge, Assignée, Source)
Housekeeping Direction: KPIs (60% Occupation, 3 Départs, 27% Propreté, 2 Maintenance), floor plan, alertes du jour
Housekeeping Gouvernante: 3 tabs (Validation, Équipe, Stocks), room cards with status
RMS Hoptym: KPIs (RevPAR €142.50, ADR €189.00, Occupation 75.4%, Revenu Total €28,450), AI recommendations, benchmark concurrentiel
Configuration: Sidebar navigation, Profil Hôtel form with all fields (Nom, Raison sociale, Classement, Type, Adresse)
critical_code_review_comments: CSS import order fixed in index.css - @import statements now before @tailwind directives
Design system correctly applied via flowtym-premium-v2.css global overrides
All modules using consistent Kleon design: violet #6C5CE7 primary, #F8F9FC background, 12/16px border-radius
Command Palette integrated in MainLayout.jsx and accessible via CTRL+K
KPI cards have colored top bars indicating status/category
Navigation tabs use data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI refonte with Kleon Figma Design System completed. All modules tested: Login, PMS Planning, Channel Manager, CRM, E-Reputation, Housekeeping (3 views), RMS Hoptym, Configuration. Command Palette accessible via CTRL+K. Design tokens in flowtym-premium-v2.css. Navigation data-testids: nav-pms, nav-channel, nav-crm, nav-ereputation, nav-housekeeping, nav-rms, nav-config. Housekeeping tabs: hk-nav-reception, hk-nav-direction, hk-nav-gouvernante.

design_verification.primary_color: #6C5CE7 (violet) - Verified in buttons, active states, KPI accents
design_verification.shadows: Soft shadows - Verified on cards and hover states
design_verification.typography: Inter font family - Verified across all pages
design_verification.command_palette: CTRL+K - Working with search, navigation, keyboard shortcuts
